rulings.Case Title: RUSSELL S. ZAPPETINI ET AL VS. JOHN MCCAIN KIM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 2, 2017, 2016, Line 1. DEFENDANT MAN KIM'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts to support delayed discovery. The veracity of those allegations cannot be addressed on a demurrer. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RIPTIDE LLC ET AL VS. EIZA AZAR ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 2, 2017, 2016, Line 4. DEFENDANTS EIZA AZAR, MARIAN AZAR'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiffs to separate their claims into separate causes of action. Currently there are at least two separate and distinct claims brought by different plaintiffs against the same defendant and there is no distinction between factual allegations as to those plaintiffs, i.e. a cause of action brought by Riptide, where Q &M LLC is the "third party;" and a cause of action by Q & M, LLC where Riptide is the "third party." Plaintiffs shall have 10 days to file an amended complaint asserting separate causes of action for interference with economic advantage and alleging facts in support of each element of each cause of action as to each plaintiff. Defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with CCP 430.41 in future. =(501/REQ)
